allow: Bash(node -e "console.log\(new Intl.NumberFormat\('bn-BD', {style:'currency', currency:'BDT'}\).format\(1234.5\)\); console.log\(new Intl.NumberFormat\('en-US', {style:'currency', currency:'BDT'}\).format\(1234.5\)\); console.log\(new Intl.NumberFormat\('en-US',{style:'currency',currency:'JPY'}\).resolvedOptions\(\).maximumFractionDigits\); console.log\(new Intl.NumberFormat\('en-US',{style:'currency',currency:'BHD'}\).resolvedOptions\(\).maximumFractionDigits\);")
